name: Cream Cheese Fruit Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the cream cheese and marshmallow cream together using an electric mixer until smooth.
2. Add the nutmeg and cinnamon to the mixture, then blend well.
3. Transfer the dip to a serving dish and refrigerate until ready to serve.
4. Serve with fresh fruit, such as strawberries, for dipping.
